United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Port Adelaide Power v North Melbourne Kangaroos.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Stories of the Finals
programme.desc: We revisit the five-goal thriller between Juventus and Real Madrid in the 2017 UEFA Champions League final in Cardiff. Ronaldo inspired Real to their third title in four years.

programme.title: The Gruppetto
programme.desc: Rob Hatch presents news from the world of cycling.

programme.title: Tour de France Men Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the third stage of the race.

programme.title: Fishing: On the Bank
programme.desc: Angling magazine show presented by Rob Hughes and Andy Ford, featuring coverage of the 2026 Sea Angling Classic.

programme.title: IFSC Climbing World Series Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the latest round of the season in Krakow, Poland.

programme.desc: San Diego Wave FC v Gotham FC.

programme.title: ABB FIA Formula E World Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the Shanghai e-Prix second race.

programme.title: Formula E Unplugged
programme.desc: A look at two German teams - ABT and Porsche.

programme.title: Formula E Unplugged
programme.desc: A look at how fans root for different teams and drivers.

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback
programme.desc: We look back at this classic bantamweight clash between Cody Garbrandt and Dominick Cruz at UFC 207 at the T-Mobile Arena in Paradise, Nevada.

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback
programme.desc: A look back at UFC 195 from January 2016 as Robbie Lawler and Carlos Condit went toe-to-toe in an enthralling welterweight showdown in Las Vegas.

programme.title: UFC Fight Flashback
programme.desc: A look back at the light heavyweight title showdown between Jon Jones and Daniel Cormier at UFC 182 in January 2015.

programme.title: MotoGP Films
programme.desc: A documentary following Fabio Quartararo - one of MotoGP’s most charismatic stars - and Yamaha as they strive to return to the pinnacle of the sport.

programme.title: WRC Review
programme.desc: A look back at the latest action from Rally Monte Carlo.

programme.title: WRC Review
programme.desc: A look back at the latest action from the 2026 World Rally Championship and Rally Sweden.

programme.title: WRC Review
programme.desc: A look back at the latest action from Safari Rally Kenya.

programme.title: WRC Review
programme.desc: A look back at the 2026 Rally Croatia.

programme.title: WRC Review
programme.desc: A look back at the Rally Islas Canarias, which served as the fifth round of the season.

programme.title: WRC Review
programme.desc: A look back at the latest action from Rally Portugal.

programme.title: WRC Review
programme.desc: A look back at Rally Japan.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Wimbledon Championships
programme.desc: From the All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club in Wimbledon, England.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. programme.title: Live: WNBA Basketball
programme.desc: Dallas plays New York in a regular-season WNBA basketball game at Barclays Center. The Wings seek to build on a their recent 86-83 win against the Sun while the Liberty enter this matchup seeking to avenge their 91-76 loss from May.

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the fourth day of the Second and Final Test in the series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua. The hosts will be hoping that they can claim just their fifth ever Test victory over Sri Lanka, with their last coming in a three-match series that was drawn 1-1 back in June 2018.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: The 1998/99 UEFA Champions League final between Manchester United and Bayern Munich at the Nou Camp. Victory for United would clinch an historic treble.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: The 2004/05 UEFA Champions League final saw Rafa Benitez's Liverpool take on AC Milan in Istanbul. The match would go down as arguably the greatest European Cup final in history.

programme.desc: Action from the Grand Prix of Monaco.

programme.title: Sign Up - Into Football
programme.desc: Damaris Cooke and Rolf Choutan go behind the scenes at Premier League clubs. Watch our favourite interviews and moments from last season, all featuring BSL and subtitles.

programme.title: Test Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Action from the fourth day of the Second and Final Test in the series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua.

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the fifth and final day of the Second and Final Test in the series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua. This is the last Test for the West Indies before they take on Pakistan in a two-match series at the end of July. Sri Lanka will have to wait a lot longer to play their next match in this format, as they don't play a Test match until they face New Zeal

programme.title: Premier League Stories
programme.desc: A catch up with former Norwich City and West Ham forward Dean Ashton as he reflects on a career that promised so much and was cut short far too soon.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1993 final between Marseille and AC Milan at Munich's Olympiastadion. The occasion was later overshadowed by one of the biggest scandals in the sport's history.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: A look back at the extraordinary 1994 final at the Olympic Stadium in Athens between Fabio Capello's AC Milan and Barcelona, managed by Johan Cruyff and dubbed the 'Dream Team'.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1995 final in Vienna between Louis van Gaal's Ajax and AC Milan. A star-studded Ajax team featured Edwin van der Sar, Ronald and Frank de Boer and Edgar Davids.

programme.desc: A cast of leading New York baseball writers and other experts to discuss the latest off-season news involving the Mets, Yankees, and key division rivals.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Pirates (3-2, 1-0 American) face the Green Wave (4-1, 1-0). Both schools enjoyed a bye after Week 5 victories. Tulane held East Carolina to just 19 points in winning the past two meetings. Jake Retzlaff (TULN) has seven rushing TDs in 2025.

programme.title: E60
programme.desc: Football coach Lane Kiffin grapples with his legacy and reflects on the coach, father and person he wants to be.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Southern Methodist University's football program was riding high in the early '80s -- only to receive the "death penalty" from the NCAA after numerous rules violations.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Driving the rolling back roads of southern Kentucky, to gnaw pork shoulder steaks cooked over hickory fires and eat burgers fried in shallow oil; introducing viewers to a cultural microclimate that straddles the Kentucky-Tennessee line.

programme.title: Live: NBA California Classic
programme.desc: From Chase Center in San Francisco.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Allan Benton, proprietor of Benton's Smoky Mountain Country Hams in Madisonville, Tenn., cures and hickory smokes bacon and ham that have earned their place on the kitchen tables of working folks across the South, and on restaurant menus.

programme.title: Live: NBA California Classic
programme.desc: From Golden 1 Center in Sacramento, Calif.

programme.title: We're #1! 1993 North Carolina Tar Heels
programme.desc: Players from the 1993 Men's Basketball North Carolina Tar Heels. Reflect on their great season.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Green Wave (6-1, 3-0 American) bring a three-game win streak into this tilt with the Roadrunners (3-4, 1-2). UTSA's Robert Henry Jr. entered Week 10 sitting third in the nation with 868 rushing yards. Tulane dumped UTSA 29-16 in November 2023.

programme.title: Athletes Unlimited Softball League
programme.desc: From Parkway Bank Sports Complex in Rosemont, Ill.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Live: Big 12 Football Media Days
programme.desc: From Ford Center at The Star in Frisco, Texas.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 24 Green Wave (8-2, 5-1 American) try for their third straight victory over the Owls (5-5, 3-3). Tulane outscored Temple 90-9 in the last two meetings. Green Wave quarterback Jake Retzlaff has accounted for 23 touchdowns, 11 on the ground.

programme.title: College Football Live
programme.desc: Want to know up-to-the-minute reports about your favorite college football team? ESPN has it covered with this weekday studio show, a roundtable format that emphasizes discussion and opinions on the sport's biggest stories and newsmakers. The half-hour program features a rotating roster of analysts that includes coaches, former players, and media personalities.

programme.title: Live: NBA Salt Lake City Summer League
programme.desc: From Jon M. Huntsman Center in Salt Lake City.

programme.title: World Cup Matchday
programme.desc: Look ahead to the evening's FIFA World Cup action, with expert opinion, live discussion and analysis of the biggest news stories.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: Live WNBA: Storm @ Sparks
programme.desc: Los Angeles Sparks take on the Seattle Storm in the WNBA.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: World Cup Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of the all the breaking news stories from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with live analysis and comment plus interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: World Cup Matchday
programme.desc: Look ahead to the evening's FIFA World Cup action, with expert opinion, live discussion and analysis of the biggest news stories.

programme.title: Live 3rd T20: England v India
programme.desc: In the third T20I of their five-match series, England and India meet at Trent Bridge.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: 3ICE
programme.desc: Coverage of three-on-three professional ice hockey action.

programme.title: Big League Wiffle Ball
programme.desc: Coverage of wiffle ball action from the professional league.

programme.title: USL Championship Soccer
programme.desc: From Highmark Stadium in Pittsburgh.

programme.title: Ultimate Frisbee Association
programme.desc: From Highmark Stadium in Pittsburgh.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Fight Sports Martial Arts
programme.desc: Coverage of judo, sumo, karate and other disciplines of martial arts.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Boxing
programme.desc: Replays of classic boxing matches.

programme.title: Fight Sports MMA
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features Amanda "Mad Dog" Lino vs. Manon Fiorot from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: Highlights from some of the world's greatest kickboxing matches.

programme.title: The Card Life
programme.desc: We learn about the hobby and business of sports card collecting.

programme.title: Hobby House
programme.desc: This month, late spring is keeping everyone in the shop busy. Chuck and Audrey spend a full day giving back with the Eagles, Phillies and 76ers. Phillies legend Larry Bowa also discusses some baseball cards from his long career.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Friends from season 2 take Alexa crawling through the Sierra Nevada Mountains.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Professional bass fisherman Jimmy Reese talks about the impact his father made on his life by introducing him to the outdoors.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: American Association of Professional Baseball
programme.desc: From Sioux Falls Stadium in Sioux Falls, S.D.

programme.title: Charlie Moore: No Offense
programme.desc: A trip to Nashville, Tennessee, with a meet and greet with musician and star of America's Got Talent Dave Fenley. Dave talks to Charlie about his career. Charlie and Dave visit Carter's Vintage Guitars. Charlie attends Dave's concert.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie heads to Charleston, S.C. He takes a haunted horse tour and meets up with long-time friend Chris Floyd to fish for sea trout and red fish; Charlie takes a stroll through historical downtown Charleston; Charlie tries the local sushi.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Diggin' Deep
programme.desc: In-depth interviews with former and current MLB players, coaches, and executives.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From PNC Park in Pittsburgh.

programme.title: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Golf at Altitude
programme.desc: Green Valley Ranch Golf Club hosts the Colorado Open Championships and features a full range practice facility in addition to its courses.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Swing Clinic With Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Golf tips, strategy and review of products.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Behind the A
programme.desc: Following Colorado Avalanche Director of Amateur Scouting Nick Pryor as he hunts for the next generation of talent.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four Teams compete in Pennsylvania for Elimination Match 3 of the Challenge Cup to advance to the Knockout Rounds.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Golf at Altitude
programme.desc: Green Valley Ranch Golf Club hosts the Colorado Open Championships and features a full range practice facility in addition to its courses.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: Golf at Altitude
programme.desc: Green Valley Ranch Golf Club hosts the Colorado Open Championships and features a full range practice facility in addition to its courses.

programme.title: Golf Life

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: HUNTER® is an exciting new series being produced by Hunter Brand Media and hosted by Dave Poteat, that explores the different ways people use their natural hunter element. The first season is rooted in good ole North American big game hunting which is where Host, Dave Poteat's roots run the deepest. But as the series grows in the years to come, we will venture out from the comforts of the Whitetai

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Celebrating Winchester Ammo and The USA.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Come along as we look back at the short-lived US service of the Krag Jorgensen. Used briefly in the Spanish-American War by Teddy Roosevelt's Rough Riders, it quickly became obsolete in the ever-changing landscape of firearms development.

programme.title: The Trail
programme.desc: Modern day mountain man Laramy Miller sets out on the trail to experience life in the high lonesome.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Veteran hunter Mike Hanback travels to all corners of North America in search of big, mature bucks. Viewers can expect heart-pounding action on every fair-chase hunt. And you'll learn a lot from Mike's insight into big bucks and the advanced tactics he uses to hunt them. The show focuses primarily on hunting whitetail deer, with a couple of hunts for giant mule deer each season. But BIG DEER TV is

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Danny Farris joins Curt Wells on the open plains of Colorado for a challenging pronghorn hunt. With little cover and sharp eyes everywhere, Danny makes a careful stalk right up to a buck to take the shot.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Batten Down October.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Deep in the cornfields of Nebraska, Scott joins in on a family tradition going back generations: turtle hunting. With claws that shred, and an unrelenting bite, Snapping Turtles are not to be taken lightly.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote, beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Clay Newcomb visit Jordan Budd for a guided Nebraska whitetail trip.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Winchester Deadly Passion is a show that will keep the viewer on the edge of their seat with hardcore style hunting mixed with Melissa's genuine and fun-loving personality.

programme.title: Hoge Wild
programme.desc: Hoge Wild is an exhilarating adventure TV series that follows the charismatic country music artist and host, Lucas Hoge, as he embarks on thrilling escapades around the world. With a passion for music, hunting, fishing, and scuba diving, Lucas Hoge brings a unique blend of talents to the screen. Viewers are taken on a wild ride as Lucas explores diverse landscapes, from rugged mountains to crystal

programme.title: The Hunter's Quest
programme.desc: Hunter and his good buddy, Casey Richmond from Eberlestock, get dropped by bush plane into the Alaskan wilderness on the caribou hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Western Hunter
programme.desc: The Western Hunter documents the journeys of public land hunters out West. The stories unfold in some of the most wild and beautiful settings on the continent in pursuit of big game.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the gray light; these moments are what make up the beauty of the wi

programme.title: Into High Country
programme.desc: Into High Country seeks to capture the most compelling and wide array of authentic hunting adventures from the most epic landscapes the Western U.S. and North America have to offer. Featured is a wide array of bow and rifle hunts for big game such as elk, mule deer, black bear, moose, pronghorn, and many more incredible and fascinating wild animal species.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Shock Therapy
programme.desc: Jim's Top Guide - 2025 Yukon Recap - Part 2.

programme.title: Greg McHale's Wild Yukon
programme.desc: Greg and Kolter head into the high country late in the season, hoping to find a ram before winter fully sets in. The conditions are tough and time is short, but the experience is about more than just the outcome.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote, beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Clay Newcomb visit Jordan Budd for a guided Nebraska whitetail trip.

programme.title: The Western Hunter
programme.desc: The Western Hunter documents the journeys of public land hunters out West. The stories unfold in some of the most wild and beautiful settings on the continent in pursuit of big game.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Ducks Unlimited Television - America's original and longest-running waterfowl series - brings the audience exciting waterfowl hunting action from around North America every season. DUTV is co-produced by MOOSE Media. The series' current stable of on-air personalities includes Doug Larsen, Fred Zink, Colin Mulligan, Betsy Newbill, Dr. Karen Waldrop, Mike Stewart and Phil Bourjaily. With support fro

programme.title: Whitetail Fix
programme.desc: A team of God-loving individuals, from different walks of life, different backgrounds, and different jobs that all share one common bond: The passion and desire to achieve their Whitetail Fix!

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: The Wild Outdoors
programme.desc: Come along with Jay and Wyatt Gregory as they share The Wild Outdoors!!! A bowhunting series in its 32nd year has something for everyone!!! The Wild Outdoors spotlights fair chase bowhunting across this great country, chasing everything from elk and antelope to turkeys and bear, with an emphasis on big mature whitetails in the Midwest!! Jay, Wyatt and the staff will take you along on hunts just th

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Deep in the cornfields of Nebraska, Scott joins in on a family tradition going back generations: turtle hunting. With claws that shred, and an unrelenting bite, Snapping Turtles are not to be taken lightly.

programme.title: Trijicon's World of Sports Afield
programme.desc: Hosted by international big game hunter Dave Fulson, Trijicon's World Of Sports Afield takes the viewer around the globe in search of big game adventure. From the rugged Yukon, to the windswept mountains of North America and Asia, to the great game fields of Africa, this series delivers world-class hunting in each episode!

programme.title: Hornady's Dark and Dangerous
programme.desc: Hornady's Dark & Dangerous is a bold series that documents the highs, lows, harsh realities and tangible risks always present on a fair chase, dangerous game safari into wild Africa. This features Africa's most recognized Professional Hunters who allow the Safari Classics camera crew unprecedented access into the world of real time safari adventure.

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Veteran hunter Mike Hanback travels to all corners of North America in search of big, mature bucks. Viewers can expect heart-pounding action on every fair-chase hunt. And you'll learn a lot from Mike's insight into big bucks and the advanced tactics he uses to hunt them. The show focuses primarily on hunting whitetail deer, with a couple of hunts for giant mule deer each season. But BIG DEER TV is

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Come along as we look back at the short-lived US service of the Krag Jorgensen. Used briefly in the Spanish-American War by Teddy Roosevelt's Rough Riders, it quickly became obsolete in the ever-changing landscape of firearms development.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Cobb and the infamous hartebeest.

programme.title: Into High Country
programme.desc: Into High Country seeks to capture the most compelling and wide array of authentic hunting adventures from the most epic landscapes the Western U.S. and North America have to offer. Featured is a wide array of bow and rifle hunts for big game such as elk, mule deer, black bear, moose, pronghorn, and many more incredible and fascinating wild animal species.

programme.title: Wild Upland
programme.desc: Kali Parmley heads into the Colorado alpine in search of dusky grouse.

programme.title: Greg McHale's Wild Yukon
programme.desc: Greg and Kolter head into the high country late in the season, hoping to find a ram before winter fully sets in. The conditions are tough and time is short, but the experience is about more than just the outcome.

programme.title: Huntworx
programme.desc: HuntWorx is a new show based around the ideology of the three major principles that aid in consistently harvesting mature animals. This plan, prep and pursue model has stood the test of time and continues to pay dividends for our cast year in and year out. With a combined over 100 years of dedicated hunting experience, Greg Glesinger, Kasey Morgan, Matt Dye, Adam Keith, and Max Mongrello wish to n

programme.title: The Western Hunter
programme.desc: The Western Hunter documents the journeys of public land hunters out West. The stories unfold in some of the most wild and beautiful settings on the continent in pursuit of big game.

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: Beautiful, cool, coastal California is the setting for this cattle ranch focused on regenerative farming.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Terry heads to Mexico to kick off the wingshooting season with Steve McCain of Wide Open Outfitters.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Mike And Geoff put an absolute clinic in Sarasota Florida.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Mike and Georgia Kate head to the Rocky Mountains of Colorado as they archery hunt mule deer.

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Veteran hunter Mike Hanback travels to all corners of North America in search of big, mature bucks. Viewers can expect heart-pounding action on every fair-chase hunt. And you'll learn a lot from Mike's insight into big bucks and the advanced tactics he uses to hunt them. The show focuses primarily on hunting whitetail deer, with a couple of hunts for giant mule deer each season. But BIG DEER TV is

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Chef and the crew continue their journey in Louisiana to cook blue crabs and hunt early teal season.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Outdoor sporting and recreational events for everyone.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Savage Arms has made firearms in America since the 19th century.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Whitetail Properties takes you on exciting hunts across the whitetail's range while providing land management tips and representing buyers and sellers of hunting, farm, ranch, timber, country homes and auctions across the country.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In an iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs onto his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth; constructing a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if a person can hit, and explode, the tank.

programme.title: Handguns
programme.desc: Micro compact pistols are easy to carry, but they can be more difficult to shoot well.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather harvests a seal during the herring spawn to make seal oil and to share traditional foods with her community.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: In the outback of Australia where everything is trying to kill you. It's monsoon season when no one attempts to roam around with salt water crocodiles lurking. Mario links up with a long time friend in search of a wild Buffalo.

programme.title: Whitetail Fix
programme.desc: A team of God-loving individuals, from different walks of life, different backgrounds, and different jobs that all share one common bond: The passion and desire to achieve their Whitetail Fix!

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Jean-Paul Bourgeois visit Ronnie Collins in Louisiana for some backwater duck hunting.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Karl Malcolm explore the Gila Wilderness while hunting for wild turkeys.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: The team is back in the Yukon getting camp set up. Included is the challenging task of transporting the ARGO UTVs from one place to another.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR Xfinity Series driver Jeb Burton takes fans beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where high-speed racing meets the great outdoors. Join Jeb and his family as they embark on thrilling hunting and fishing adventures, all while championing conservation and land management. From the fast-paced world of NASCAR to the peace of nature, this series offers an exciting glimpse in

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Blue Jays travel to Oracle Park to battle the Giants in Game 1 of a three-game series. Kevin Gausman is the expected starter for the Blue Jays against the Giants expected starting pitcher Landen Roupp. Casey Schmitt leads the Giants in home runs.

programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Calgary Stampede
programme.desc: Day 5.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Countdown
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: World's Strongest Man
programme.desc: Athletes compete for the title of world's strongest man.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Highlights
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries
programme.desc: Four Missouri farm boys run into bug trouble as they fish for silver salmon.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: Azura Quilalea Island is a hidden gem in the northern tropical climes of Mozambique, a private, wholly uninhabited island paradise surrounded by the pristine waters of the Quirimbas Archipelago marine sanctuary, need we say more?

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: The highest Kingdom in the world is also home to the wildest Trout to be found in Africa. Gareth and Jerry trek across the mountains exploring the Senqu and Maletsunyane Rivers before Rhu joins them on the tailwater of Mohale dam, chasing the highland fish of Lesotho.

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: The mighty Zambezi River winds its way through the Barotse Flood Plains, a natural breeding ground for all endemic fish species, which makes it the ideal habitat for Africa's most ferocious freshwater game fish.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: Tiger season is a go; we head deep into the Tanzanian jungle in search of the Blue Tiger; Craig Thomassen adds to his outstanding year of personal bests in Mnyera River.

programme.title: Wildfly Best of
programme.desc: Kruger National Park, joining scientists in a groundbreaking study of rivers that have never been fished before. Teeming with wildlife, under the watchful eyes of park rangers we discover the ferocious predators that the Sabie River holds.

programme.title: Fifty Places to Fly Fish Before You Die
programme.desc: Guides Tom Baltz and Ed Shenk teach Conway the subtle techniques required at Pennsylvania's fly-fishing classroom, the LeTort. Then Conway heads to the Yellow Breeches for its world renowned trout fishing.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries
programme.desc: Bad weather forces Dr Bob to swap his plane for a jet boat as he takes a Rose Bowl winner & friends salmon fishing.

programme.title: Dr. Bob's Wild Diaries
programme.desc: Four Missouri farm boys run into bug trouble as they fish for silver salmon.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - 2025 Redcrest Championship Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour from Lake Guntersville in Birmingham, AL.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: Spencer Shuffield and Todd Goade fight for the Ultimate Match Fishing title on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: The VanDam Experience
programme.desc: Kevin VanDam matches the hatch on the perch migration for big bites.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. programme.title: The VanDam Experience
programme.desc: Kevin VanDam matches the hatch on the perch migration for big bites.

programme.title: Fly Fusion
programme.desc: Filmed in British Columbia's Kootenay region, co-hosts Jim McLennan and Derek Bird fly fish for oversized bull trout and Westslope cutthroat.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Rob Heal and Mark Melnyk are in Chilean Patagonia on the hunt for giant pre-spawn brown trout on fly.

programme.title: Wild Game Cooking With Chef Rupert
programme.desc: Chef Rupert prepares a moose braciole stuffed with moose and topped with Parmesan cheese.

programme.title: Vintage Vessels
programme.desc: Classic boats at a boat show in Port Carling, Ont., include a 1902 Lozier Launch, a 1927 Minette-Shields and a 1956 Shepherd Runabout; the Peter Breen Antique & Classic Boat Co.

programme.title: Gary Cooper's Fishing Diary
programme.desc: Gary joins Tim and Marius to fish for Coho Salmon on the West Coast of Vancouver Island.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Mike Mitchell spends the first day of the NHL Enforcers alumni derby at Shearwater Resort with Mike Brown, Dana Murzyn and Craig Levie.

programme.title: Fishing the Rock
programme.desc: Join host Kastine Coleman as she heads out lobster fishing in Newfoundland & Labrador.

programme.title: Fly Fusion
programme.desc: Filmed in British Columbia's Kootenay region, co-hosts Jim McLennan and Derek Bird fly fish for oversized bull trout and Westslope cutthroat.

programme.desc: Rob Heal and Mark Melnyk are in Chilean Patagonia on the hunt for giant pre-spawn brown trout on fly.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing

programme.title: Fishing the Rock
programme.desc: Join host Kastine Coleman as she heads out lobster fishing in Newfoundland & Labrador.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: Arkansas Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Luck-E Strike is back and better than ever thanks to the vision of original founder Toby Keith. And a sporting goods clerk is our newest angler!

programme.title: Fishing the Midwest
programme.desc: Scott Turnage from G3 Boats joins Mike Frisch during a major cold front, but the guys still catch some dynamite bass!

programme.title: Angling Edge Adventures
programme.desc: Topwater Smallmouth on Lake Vermilion.

programme.title: Facts of Fishing
programme.desc: Hoping for a trophy, Dave instead uncovers an underwater nursery of tiny bass that out-compete the big ones.
